templates.name: Open lab
templates.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 300 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif"><rect x="5" y="5" width="290" height="190" rx="4" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2.5"/><path d="M132 195 h32" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none"/><path d="M164 195 A32 32 0 0 1 132 227" fill="none" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="20" y="26" width="92" height="46" rx="3" fill="#e7f0fb" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.6"/><line x1="51" y1="26" x2="51" y2="72" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.4"/><line x1="82" y1="26" x2="82" y2="72" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.4"/><text x="66" y="19" font-size="9" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Freezer bank</text><rect x="196" y="22" width="84" height="26" rx="3" fill="#f1f5f9" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.6"/><text x="238" y="18" font-size="9" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Fume hood</text><rect x="120" y="150" width="150" height="30" rx="3" fill="#e7f0fb" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.6"/><line x1="170" y1="150" x2="170" y2="180" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.4"/><line x1="220" y1="150" x2="220" y2="180" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.4"/><text x="195" y="145" font-size="9" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Bench</text><rect x="20" y="150" width="40" height="40" rx="3" fill="#f1f5f9" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.6"/><circle cx="40" cy="170" r="9" fill="none" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.4"/><text x="40" y="146" font-size="9" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Sink</text></svg>

templates.name: L-shaped lab

templates.name: Two-bay lab
templates.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 300 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif"><rect x="5" y="5" width="290" height="190" rx="4" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2.5"/><line x1="150" y1="5" x2="150" y2="120" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M150 120 h28" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none"/><path d="M178 120 A28 28 0 0 1 150 148" fill="none" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="24" y="28" width="100" height="26" rx="3" fill="#e7f0fb" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.6"/><text x="74" y="23" font-size="9" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Bench</text><rect x="176" y="28" width="100" height="26" rx="3" fill="#e7f0fb" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.6"/><text x="226" y="23" font-size="9" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Bench</text><rect x="24" y="150" width="100" height="30" rx="3" fill="#e7f0fb" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.6"/><rect x="176" y="150" width="100" height="30" rx="3" fill="#e7f0fb" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.6"/><text x="75" y="196" font-size="8" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Bay 1</text><text x="225" y="196" font-size="8" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Bay 2</text></svg>
